idea_text: Test a free delivery banner for repeat customers on checkout pages to improve purchase conversion without hurting gross margin.
business_context: The reviewer wants stronger commercial guardrails before launch.

clarification_answers.q1: Primary metric is purchase conversion rate.
clarification_answers.q2: The audience is logged-in repeat customers with at least two purchases in the last 90 days.

reviewer_comments: Add explicit subsidy and gross-margin thresholds before approving the launch recommendation.
